scripts.docs:dev: pnpm --dir docs install --ignore-workspace && pnpm -C docs docs:dev
scripts.docs:build: pnpm --dir docs install --ignore-workspace && DEMO_BASE="${BASE_PATH%/}/demo/" pnpm --filter @airalogy/aimd-demo build && pnpm -C docs docs:build && rm -rf docs/.vitepress/dist/demo && mkdir -p docs/.vitepress/dist/demo && cp -R demo/dist/. docs/.vitepress/dist/demo/ && node ./scripts/create-demo-route-shims.mjs
scripts.docs:preview: pnpm --dir docs install --ignore-workspace && pnpm -C docs docs:preview
